LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THIS MATTER IS NOT CONTESTED, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. DEPUTY: NOT PRESENT. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Flint Corey Zide, Esq., Tel.626.720.4308, appearing for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing re: Plaintiff Bank Of America, N.A.'s Motion For Default Judgment.

The matter is called. Mr. Zide submits on the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for default judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Not present. Matter not reported.
(302/RBU)
